query: I have a 120K-row SFT dataset I scraped from a customer-support forum, plus a 2K held-out eval split. Both files are JSONL in ShareGPT format (conversations field with from/value turns). Target model is Llama-3.1-8B. I want to audit the dataset before launching training. Walk me through it.
expected_behavior: Walks the audit covering at minimum: chat-template conformance under the target Llama-3 template, duplicate detection (exact AND near-duplicate clustering, not just hash equality), AND train-vs-eval leakage via substring n-gram overlap
Requires PII detection with an explicit policy input (or the documented default minimum) AND specifies that failing rows are quarantined to separate files, NOT silently dropped from the dataset
Names that leakage findings recommend dropping TRAIN rows (not eval rows) AND that the audit is re-runnable / re-audited after remediation, not a one-shot certification
